title: Stonepass Spire — Floor 1
summary: Floor 1 of Stonepass Spire: the blocked bridge at the tower's base. Five choices branch the climb; the fight path triggers a landslide, a hidden cave labyrinth, and the first floor boss.

storyBeats.title: The Blocked Bridge
storyBeats.description: An ogre blocks the only bridge at the foot of Stonepass Spire. Mist hangs over the river and the old stones groan under its weight.

availableChoices.label: Fight the ogre
availableChoices.description: Draw steel and challenge the bridge guardian.

availableChoices.label: Trick the ogre
availableChoices.description: Lure the ogre away with a false alarm upstream.

availableChoices.label: Offer food
availableChoices.description: Share travel rations and hope hunger wins over hostility.

availableChoices.label: Talk to the ogre
availableChoices.description: Ask why the bridge is guarded and listen for a peaceful way forward.

availableChoices.label: Sneak past
availableChoices.description: Slip through the river reeds while the ogre watches the treeline.

storyBeats.title: After the Landslide
storyBeats.description: The battle shook the cliffs. Fresh rubble covers the path and cold air breathes from a newly torn cave mouth beneath the bridge.

availableChoices.label: Enter the hidden cave
availableChoices.description: Climb over fallen stone and follow the draft into the dark.

availableChoices.label: Survey the rubble first
availableChoices.description: Search the slope for survivors or safer footing before going deeper.

storyBeats.title: Spire Antechamber
storyBeats.description: You cross the bridge into the Spire's lower antechamber. Lanterns flicker in the square and Elder Mara watches climbers from the old well.

availableChoices.label: Greet Elder Mara
availableChoices.description: Introduce yourself and ask what troubles the valley.

availableChoices.label: Explore the market stalls
availableChoices.description: Walk the square and listen for rumors before committing to a plan.

storyBeats.title: The Elder's Counsel
storyBeats.description: Elder Mara pulls you aside. The ogre's words still echo, and the elder seems ready to trust you with valley secrets.

availableChoices.label: Accept the elder's request
availableChoices.description: Promise to help Stonepass without reckless violence.

availableChoices.label: Keep your own counsel
availableChoices.description: Thank the elder but stay focused on your own path.

storyBeats.title: The Dragon Stirs
storyBeats.description: Heat rolls through the valley. From the collapsed cave mouth, a low roar answers the thunder — something ancient has woken beneath Stonepass.

availableChoices.label: Warn the valley
availableChoices.description: Race back toward Stonepass Square to raise the alarm.

consequences.summary: You defeat the ogre in a fierce struggle. The bridge clears, but the battle shakes the valley slopes.
visibleChanges: The ogre collapses and the bridge is passable.
Rocks tumble from the cliffs, revealing a hidden cave mouth.

consequences.summary: You trick the ogre into chasing a false alarm. It lumbers upstream, leaving the bridge unguarded.
visibleChanges: The ogre stomps away into the treeline.
The bridge stands open, swaying slightly in the wind.

consequences.summary: You offer food and the ogre grudgingly allows passage, chewing while it watches you cross.
visibleChanges: The ogre accepts the rations and steps aside.
It grunts approval as you cross the bridge.

consequences.summary: You talk to the ogre and learn the bridge was blocked after valley hunters broke an old truce.
visibleChanges: The ogre lowers its club and listens.
It admits the valley elders broke a promise first.

consequences.summary: You sneak past the ogre along the riverbank. It never turns from the treeline.
visibleChanges: You slip through the reeds unseen.
The ogre keeps scanning the forest, unaware you crossed.

consequences.summary: You commit to the hidden cave. The temporary instance opens beneath the broken cliff.
visibleChanges: You duck beneath fallen stone and enter the cold dark.
The cave mouth seals behind you with a grinding shudder.

consequences.summary: You search the rubble and confirm no villagers were caught in the slide, but the cave mouth remains the only lead.
visibleChanges: No survivors call from the rubble.
The exposed cave still breathes cold air onto the path.

consequences.summary: Elder Mara welcomes you and warns that strange tremors have been felt beneath the valley.
visibleChanges: Elder Mara studies you with sharp, kind eyes.
She speaks of tremors and old promises broken at the bridge.

consequences.summary: You walk the square and hear traders gossip about a sealed cave and a sleeping wyrm.
visibleChanges: Traders mention tremors and a cave that was buried for generations.
One stall keeper crosses their fingers when the word dragon is spoken.

consequences.summary: You accept Elder Mara's request to investigate the valley's tremors without reckless bloodshed.
visibleChanges: Elder Mara presses a valley sigil into your palm.
She asks you to report anything that moves beneath the old stone.

consequences.summary: You thank the elder but keep your own counsel, leaving the square on your own terms.
visibleChanges: Elder Mara nods without offense.
You leave the square with the valley's secrets still unclaimed.

consequences.summary: You reach the dragon chamber and ancient power stirs. The cave collapses as something vast wakes beneath Stonepass.
visibleChanges: Runes flare in the dark and the chamber trembles.
Stone rains down behind you as a deep roar shakes the valley.

consequences.summary: You raise a torch and the bats scatter into the dark.
visibleChanges: The bat cloud splits and flees deeper into the cave.

consequences.summary: You bat aside the swarm and push through the fallen rocks.
visibleChanges: Wings slap your arms, but the path ahead clears.

consequences.summary: The runes flare red and fade. The chamber rumbles but nothing wakes.
visibleChanges: Stone dust rains from the ceiling. Try another pattern.

consequences.summary: The runes lock into place and a low hum fills the chamber.
visibleChanges: Blue fire runs along the rune lines toward the heart of the cave.

consequences.summary: You race toward Stonepass Square to warn the valley that the dragon has awakened.
visibleChanges: Lanterns flare awake across the square.
Elder Mara hears your warning and orders the bells rung.

npcs.name: Bridge Ogre
npcs.description: A hulking ogre guarding the only bridge at the foot of Stonepass Spire.

npcs.name: Elder Mara
npcs.description: The village elder who watches over Stonepass from the town square.

temporaryInstances.title: The Hidden Cave
temporaryInstances.description: An unstable cave exposed by the landslide beneath Stonepass Bridge.
temporaryInstances.entranceText: Cold air spills from a jagged opening in the cliff. Loose stones still skitter down the slope.

rooms.title: Cave Mouth
rooms.description: Mud and broken roots line the narrow entrance.

rooms.title: Fallen Rocks
rooms.description: A pile of boulders blocks the path deeper into the cave.

rooms.title: Dragon Chamber
rooms.description: A vast chamber opens ahead. Something ancient stirs in the dark.
